name: Bonnie Raitt
abstract: Bonnie Lynn Raitt (; born November 8, 1949) is an American singer and songwriter. In 1971, Raitt released her self-titled debut album.

concerts.label: Lightnin Hopkins, Bonnie Raitt, and Muddy Waters
Rainforest Foundation Benefit Concert
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Mose Allison
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] I remember that you liked Bonnie Raitt’s version of “Everybody Crying Mercy.” ... [INTERVIEWEE] Happy that they did it, sure.
about_quotes.doc_title: Mose Allison — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Bill Goodwin
about_quotes.evidence: And we did a monstrous opening for Bonnie Raitt which was really great and I got to know her and her guys in her band.
about_quotes.doc_title: Bill Goodwin interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, May 28, 2025

about_quotes.speaker: Allen Toussaint
about_quotes.evidence: Yes, love her music. ... Bonnie Raitt is well-versed, I guess, if you know Bonnie Raitt at all.

about_quotes.speaker: Jimmy Witherspoon
about_quotes.evidence: you have some wonderful people in music, like Bonnie Raitt, Van Morrison, real
about_quotes.doc_title: Jimmy Witherspoon interviewed by Monk Rowe, Sarasota, FL, April 12, 1996
